summary: \n\n[00:00-00:20]: The video clearly demonstrates Use Case 1: waste segregation into biodegradable and reusable materials. The visual evidence includes a person correctly placing a plastic water bottle into a bin labeled 'REUSABLE' (00:03-00:07) and an orange into a bin labeled 'Bio Degradable' (00:10-00:14). A robot could assist by automating this sorting process, using visual sensors to identify objects and manipulators to place them in the correct bins.
